notes: Per-site comparison of contact record counts from two sources (audit trail). n_contacts_snapshot: semicolon-delimited entries in team_member_name field. n_contacts_badm: distinct GROUP_IDs with TEAM_MEMBER_NAME or TEAM_CONTACT_NAME in BADM GRP_TEAM/TEAM_MEMBER/TEAM_CONTACT groups. badm_has_more=TRUE indicates BADM has additional contacts; these are now included in authorship_invitations.csv as contact_source='badm_extra' (or 'badm_fallback' for sites with snapshot=0). This file is the raw audit trail — it is not modified by the merge decision. Sorted: badm_has_more DESC, difference DESC.
